description: A designed dark graphic headed 'ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL' with the date '1/27/2025' and 'Atlanta, GA'. It includes a faint background image of handcuffs, a name in white text, and a 'CRIME:' line listing '2 counts of child molestation'. An ICE seal sits at lower left and a red 'ATLANTA' tab at right. There is no candid photo of a person.
